document_title: Warning Letter to Medical Products Laboratories, Inc., MARCS-CMS 721916
notes: FDA CGMP warning letter to a U.S. contract manufacturer in Philadelphia, citing four numbered CGMP violations (with three italicized sub-sections under Violation 3) plus a separate Unapproved New Drug Violations section enumerating 13 products. Pressures ordered CFR citation lists, nested sub-headings, two distinct stability findings in different parts of the letter, multiple-signatory blocks (Francis Godwin and Tina Smith), redacted (b)(4) lot tables, response-adequacy distinctions per violation, GDUFA III footnote, and a multi-leg inspection-to-response-to-letter chronology.
